blended.narrative: Whitewater is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,985 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
